title: Spicy Pad Thai Tacos
description: A fusion of Mexican and Thai flavors, these Spicy Pad Thai Tacos are a unique twist on traditional tacos. Crispy tacos shells are filled with spicy stir-fried noodles, crunchy vegetables, and savory tofu.

ingredients.name: tofu
ingredients.notes: firm or soft, whichever you prefer

ingredients.name: tortillas
ingredients.notes: corn or flour, whichever you prefer

instructions: Heat a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of oil and swirl it around.
Add the tofu and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Remove the tofu from the skillet and set it aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil and swirl it around.
Add the Thai chili peppers and cook for 1 minute.
Add the gingerly Thai rice noodles and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the pad Thai sauce, cumin, and lime juice.
Add the cooked tofu back into the skillet and stir-fry for another minute.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the noodle mixture into the tortillas.
Garnish with cilantro and serve immediately.
